invariants: Every row has strictly positive Bernstein coefficients.
The scout covers only degree 3 m<=10, degree 4 m<=7, and degree 5 m<=8.
Rows beyond the first hard frontier are diagnostic extensions, not an all-m theorem.
Degree-5 rows are higher-degree diagnostic extensions, not an all-degree theorem.
Endpoint PF, Jensen hyperbolicity, Laguerre-Polya membership, RH, and Lambda <= 0 are forbidden as inputs.
proof_boundary: Exact bounded column-recurrence theorem-search diagnostic only. It proves positive Bernstein certificates for finitely many degree-3 and degree-4 column rows under monotone contractions, but it does not prove monotone contractions for the zeta coefficients, all column rows, all Schur shapes, Jensen-window PF-infinity, RH, or Lambda <= 0.

summary.main_finding: The monotone-contraction cone certifies more than the first two hard column-frontier rows: degree 3 is certified through m=10 and degree 4 through m=7, with three rows beyond the original hard frontier; the same method also certifies degree 5 through m=8. This strengthens the monotone-contraction route as a column-family target, while leaving the all-m/all-shape and zeta cone-entry theorems open.
